chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1667 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 30-08-2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners, no intimation received, even we have seen the prayer of the petition which appears to be non-maintainable. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
